name: Microsoft Power BI
summary: Business intelligence platform for analytical modelling, reporting and interactive dashboards.

name: Power Query
summary: ETL and data transformation environment used to prepare and standardise analytical datasets.

name: Microsoft Excel
summary: Spreadsheet platform used for analysis, modelling, validation and reporting.

name: Microsoft SharePoint
summary: Document management and collaboration platform used for structured business information.

name: Microsoft Project
summary: Project planning and scheduling software used for delivery management.

name: PowerShell
summary: Automation and administration shell for Microsoft infrastructure and cloud platforms.

name: Microsoft Intune
summary: Endpoint management platform used for provisioning, configuration and policy management.

name: Microsoft Entra
summary: Identity and access management platform for authentication, authorisation and governance.

name: IntelliJ IDEA
summary: Integrated development environment used primarily for Java software development.

name: Git
summary: Distributed version control system supporting collaborative software development.

name: GitHub
summary: Hosted Git platform for source control, collaboration and portfolio publication.

name: GitLab
summary: DevOps platform providing source control, CI/CD and project management.

name: Cytoscape.js
summary: JavaScript graph visualisation library used to create interactive knowledge graphs.

name: monday.com
summary: Work management and collaboration platform used for planning, tracking and coordinating project delivery.

name: Jira
summary: Issue tracking and agile project management platform supporting backlog management, sprint planning and delivery workflows.

name: Microsoft Visio
summary: Diagramming and modelling tool used to produce process maps, solution architectures, network diagrams and workflow documentation.
